creator: royger@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

Thanks for the feedback, do you think it would be possible for you to bisect the changes between Xen 4.16 and 4.17 in order to see if you identify which commit is causing the regression to boot on your hardware?

I'm afraid without at least a full log I don't have much idea about what could go wrong.

Also, if you boot with `vga=keep` on the xen_cmdline do you see any extra output related to Xen?
